name: Ivan Braginsky
description:
Ivan goes away for a week and you try to escape but lowkenuinely get ur leg stuck in a beartrap... Then he returns and gets mad at you and takes you down to the basement to get freaky.

Also he jokes about amputating you and ripping out ur teeth with pliers (he doesn't actually do it in the initial message but it MIGHT happen depending on what plugins or prompts you use). ☃️

Possible content warnings: Dub-con/Non-con, abusive behaviour, mentions of amputation, yandere-ish behavior, dark themes

This is a similar premise to my Canada bot, but Ivan is (to put it politely) much more insane. Same as that bot, the user is someone who Ivan took in when they were younger and keeps in his manor.

His personality is... Mostly the same, with some extra details, so he might come off as ooc??. I did include his relationships with his sisters in the personality; Ukraine's name is Katyusha in this, and I changed the relationship between him and Belarus because I do NAWWWT like ts incest slop, she just looks up to him in this

When I used this it was mostly psychology-based rp and less gooning, just a disclaimer.

Update: checked on this. I honestly thought this bot would be too much for janitor at first but I forgot the kind of freaks that are on this site... /lh anyways, I added a sexual behavior section to the personality. There's not much I added but still
